name: SyncHarbor
one_liner: Unified data sync for small accounting and bookkeeping tools.
long_description: SyncHarbor built connectors that kept invoices, expenses and bank feeds consistent across small-business bookkeeping stacks.

name: ClinicFlow
one_liner: Patient intake and scheduling automation for independent clinics.
long_description: ClinicFlow automated intake forms, reminders and insurance checks for small healthcare practices.

name: FreightPilot
one_liner: Back-office automation for independent freight brokers.
long_description: FreightPilot digitized recordkeeping, quoting and compliance paperwork for small freight brokerages.

name: LedgerNest
one_liner: Bookkeeping copilot for freelancers and solo founders.
long_description: LedgerNest categorized freelancer expenses and drafted quarterly tax estimates automatically.

name: ComplyDeck
long_description: ComplyDeck collected compliance evidence continuously and mapped it to SOC 2 and HIPAA controls.

name: MenuMint
one_liner: Dynamic menu and inventory sync for independent restaurants.
long_description: MenuMint kept delivery-platform menus, POS items and inventory counts in sync for small restaurants.
